subcodes.first_line: O Most Exalted Pen! This day is Thy day. Move, by Mine All-Glorious Name, upon the pages of creation, and make mention of them that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم الاعلی الیوم یومک تحرک باسمی الابهی علی اوراق الانشاء ثم اذکر من
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
